# Dalia McMillan

> Solution Focused Hypnotherapy with Dalia McMillan — in person in Brighton, UK, and online.

## Overview

Dalia McMillan is a Solution Focused Hypnotherapist trained with CPHT and a member of AfSFH. She has 28 years of experience in therapeutic and wellbeing practice and works with adults and children over 8. Sessions blend talking therapy with a deeply relaxing trance state, drawing on neuroscience, psychotherapy, NLP and CBT to help clients feel calmer, move forward, and free themselves from patterns that no longer serve them.
